ValidationRule.description: Validates that the Supplier Costs can not be assigned to another Project.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, ISCHANGED( PackageName__c ), PRIORVALUE(ProjektName__c ) = "Drittkosten Inbox für nicht zuweisbare Drittkosten - do not delete"
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot assign the Supplier Costs to a Service of another Project. (SE001)
